summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WiseDrive CRM V2 HR Module and Audit Trail features. All core functionality working correctly. Backend APIs (19/19 tests passed) and Frontend UI verified.
passed_tests: Backend API - GET /api/salaries (CEO) returns salary list with user info (200)
Backend API - GET /api/salaries (HR Manager) returns salary list (200)
Backend API - GET /api/salaries (Sales Exec) returns 403 Forbidden
Backend API - POST /api/salaries creates new salary with audit log (200)
Backend API - Salary records include user_name, user_email, role_name
Backend API - GET /api/audit-logs (CEO) returns audit logs (200)
Backend API - GET /api/audit-logs (HR Manager) returns audit logs (200)
Backend API - GET /api/audit-logs (Sales Exec) returns 403 Forbidden
Backend API - GET /api/audit-logs/stats returns stats with total, recent_24h, by_entity, by_action
Backend API - Audit logs have required fields: id, entity_type, entity_id, action, user_id, timestamp
Backend API - CEO visible_tabs includes 'hr' tab
Backend API - HR Manager visible_tabs includes 'hr' tab
Backend API - Sales Exec visible_tabs does NOT include 'hr' tab
Backend API - Employees have role_name field populated
Backend API - Employees have country_name field populated
Frontend - CEO can see HR/Salary tab in Admin page
Frontend - CEO can see Audit Trail tab in Admin page
Frontend - HR Manager can see HR/Salary tab in Admin page
Frontend - HR Manager can see Audit Trail tab in Admin page
Frontend - Sales Executive does NOT see Admin tab (no access to HR/Audit)
Frontend - HR/Salary tab shows salary table with Employee, Role, CTC, Fixed Pay, Variable Pay, Commission %, Per Inspection, Effective From
Frontend - Audit Trail tab shows stats cards (Total Actions, Last 24 Hours, Lead Actions, Salary Updates)
Frontend - Audit Trail tab shows audit logs with Timestamp, User, Action, Entity, Details
Frontend - Employee tab shows role names correctly (CEO, HR Manager, Sales Executive, etc.)
Frontend - Employee tab shows country correctly (India)
Frontend - Add Salary Structure modal opens with employee dropdown and salary fields

test_credentials.CEO: ceo@wisedrive.com / password123 (sees HR and Audit tabs)
test_credentials.HR Manager: hr@wisedrive.com / password123 (sees HR and Audit tabs)
test_credentials.Sales Executive: salesexec1.in@wisedrive.com / password123 (does NOT see HR and Audit tabs)

seed_data_creation: Salary structures created during testing: 6 salary records for various employees
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Module and Audit Trail fully tested. Salary CRUD works correctly with audit logging. Tab visibility based on role works correctly (CEO and HR Manager see HR/Audit tabs, Sales Exec does not). Employee tab shows role_name and country_name correctly.

mocked_apis.Vaahan car lookup API: MOCKED in LeadsPage.jsx payment modal - returns mock car data

features_verified.HR/Salary Tab Visibility: Only visible for CEO and HR Manager, NOT for Sales Executive
features_verified.Audit Trail Tab Visibility: Only visible for CEO and HR Manager
features_verified.Salary Creation: Works correctly - creates salary structure with audit log
features_verified.Salary Listing: Shows all salary structures with employee details (name, email, role)
features_verified.Audit Logs Listing: Shows all audit actions with filters (Entity Type, Action)
features_verified.Audit Stats: Dashboard showing Total Actions, Last 24 Hours, Lead Actions, Salary Updates
features_verified.Employee Tab: Shows role names and country correctly
